2:
You have been granted entry into the Thousand Maws of Toto–Rak. Hurry within and find Frixio before he falls prey to fell fiends.

※Challenge the Thousand Maws of Toto–Rak with other players via the Duty Finder, or with a party of NPCs via Duty Support. Both systems are accessible from the main menu as well as the dungeon's entrance point.
